ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "subregion" INTEGER /* Reference to the subregion */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp_total" REAL /* Total GDP of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the country data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_subregion FOREIGN KEY ("subregion") REFERENCES subregions ("subregion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "exports" REAL /* Value of exports (in millions of USD) */,
  "imports" REAL /* Value of imports (in millions of USD) */,
  "income" REAL /* Average income per capita (in USD) */,
  "inflation" REAL /* Inflation rate (in percentage) */,
  "gdpp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product per capita (in USD) */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate (in percentage) */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate (in percentage) */,
  "public_debt" REAL /* Public debt as a percentage of GDP */,
  "external_debt" REAL /* External debt (in millions of USD) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "child_mort" INTEGER /* Child mortality rate (per 1,000 live births) */,
  "health_spending" REAL /* Health spending as a percentage of GDP */,
  "life_expec" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth (in years) */,
  "total_fer" REAL /* Total fertility rate (births per woman) */,
  "hiv_prevalence" REAL /* HIV prevalence rate (in percentage) */,
  "malaria_incidence" REAL /* Malaria incidence rate (per 1,000 population) */,
  "obesity_rate" REAL /* Obesity rate (in percentage) */,
  "smoking_prevalence" REAL /* Smoking prevalence rate (in percentage) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "total_population" TEXT /* Total population of the region */,
  "gdp_total" REAL /* Total GDP of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subregions" (
  "subregion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subregion */,
  "subregion_name" TEXT /* Name of the subregion */,
  "total_population" TEXT /* Total population of the subregion */,
  "gdp_total" REAL /* Total GDP of the subregion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subregion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the indicator type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the client accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
